title: Control intensity
subtitle: Strong, moderate, soft.
overview: Module: Style, Register, and Precision. B2 Hi develops high-B2 independence: layered argument, long-form speaking, deep native input, professional authority, precise style, complex topics, and C1 readiness.

sections.title: B2 hi focus
rows: Advanced speakers control how strong a statement sounds.
高级说话者会控制一句话听起来有多强。
B2 Hi frame: choose the register, control intensity, sharpen vocabulary, and make the sentence sound natural.
B2 Hi 框架：选择语域、控制强度、打磨词汇，并让句子听起来自然。
Soften a strong statement without losing meaning.
柔化一个强烈说法但不丢失意思。
Instead of saying “This is wrong,” I might say “This may not be the most effective approach.” The second version leaves room for discussion while still expressing concern.
与其说“这是错的”，我可能说“这可能不是最有效的方法。”第二种版本留出讨论空间，同时仍然表达担忧。

items.en: Advanced speakers control how strong a statement sounds.
items.zh: 高级说话者会控制一句话听起来有多强。

items.en: B2 Hi frame: choose the register, control intensity, sharpen vocabulary, and make the sentence sound natural.
items.zh: B2 Hi 框架：选择语域、控制强度、打磨词汇，并让句子听起来自然。

items.en: Instead of saying “This is wrong,” I might say “This may not be the most effective approach.” The second version leaves room for discussion while still expressing concern.
items.zh: 与其说“这是错的”，我可能说“这可能不是最有效的方法。”第二种版本留出讨论空间，同时仍然表达担忧。

items.en: I will make the answer independent, not just correct.
items.zh: 我会让回答独立，而不只是正确。

items.en: A high B2 answer should show structure, judgment, tone control, and real examples.
items.zh: 高 B2 回答应该显示结构、判断力、语气控制和真实例子。

items.en: If my idea is complex, I will guide the listener with clear transitions.
items.zh: 如果我的想法复杂，我会用清楚转场引导听者。

items.en: I can revise for precision without making the language heavy.
items.zh: 我可以为了准确而修改，同时不让语言变沉重。

items.en: This lesson should help me speak and write with more authority and more humility.
items.zh: 这节课应该帮助我更有权威感也更谦逊地说和写。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Soften a strong statement without losing meaning.
lines.zh: 柔化一个强烈说法但不丢失意思。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Instead of saying “This is wrong,” I might say “This may not be the most effective approach.” The second version leaves room for discussion while still expressing concern.
lines.zh: 与其说“这是错的”，我可能说“这可能不是最有效的方法。”第二种版本留出讨论空间，同时仍然表达担忧。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more independent and better structured?
lines.zh: 你能让这个回应更独立、结构更好吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the issue, add depth, address a complication, and close with a practical implication.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义问题、加入深度、处理复杂点，并用实际影响收尾。

items.en: Soften a strong statement without losing meaning.
items.zh: 柔化一个强烈说法但不丢失意思。

items.en: Answer once in seven or eight sentences with clear transitions.
items.zh: 用七到八句话回答一次，并使用清楚转场。

items.en: Add one high-B2 move: define a term, answer an objection, or qualify the conclusion.
items.zh: 加入一个高 B2 动作：定义术语、回应反对意见或限定结论。

items.en: Record the answer and revise one sentence for precision and natural rhythm.
items.zh: 录下回答，并修改一句话，让它更准确、节奏更自然。

items.en: Keep the revised version as a model for future C1 Bridge practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的版本保留为未来 C1 Bridge 练习的模型。
